notes: Existing findings.md and lanes/ remain the audit source of truth.
Wave 1 mechanical sweeps are complete; this hub now locks the next native installed-PWA remediation slice.
Afo chose plan-hub-only packaging first, with stacked implementation slices later.
Architecture decision: migrate PWA drawer behavior toward one shared gesture-capable sheet contract.
Do not expand this slice into full Wave 3 translation content or broad Wave 4 theme RFCs.

ui.handoff_note: Implement localized PWA toasts, shared gesture-capable sheet API, drawer/dialog migration, route motion, haptics preference, aria-label i18n, and DESIGN.pwa.md routing correction.

red.evidence: /tmp/red-proof-pwa-ui.txt: createLocalizedToasts exported but never imported outside its own module; PWA toast callsites use static (English-only) presets in JobQueue, Work, useWorkMutation, useBatchWorkSync, mutation-error-handler, PwaUpdateNotifier; ModalDrawer/WorkDashboard have no @use-gesture/@react-spring imports (no drag-to-dismiss); getPwaDrawerCloseDelayMs ignores prefers-reduced-motion; aria-label hardcoded English in OfflineIndicator/TopNav/DraftDialog/Gardeners; navigator.vibrate direct in useWorkApprovalActions; DESIGN.pwa.md references non-existent PlatformRouter.

green.command: cd packages/shared && bun run test src/__tests__/components/PwaSheet.test.tsx src/__tests__/components/toast-registry.test.ts src/__tests__/i18n/locale-coverage.test.ts && cd ../client && bun run test src/__tests__/components/DraftDialog.test.tsx src/__tests__/components/OfflineIndicator.test.tsx src/__tests__/components/TopNav.test.tsx src/__tests__/styles/pwaDrawerStyles.test.ts src/__tests__/views/AppSettings.test.tsx src/__tests__/views/WorkDashboard.test.tsx && cd ../.. && bun run check:design-generated && bun run check:design-tokens && bun run lint:vocab && cd packages/shared && bun run check:stories && bun run check:story-quality
green.evidence: Shared: 25/25 PwaSheet+toast-registry+locale-coverage tests pass. Client: 33/33 targeted tests pass. Full client suite: 276/276 assertion tests pass (18 pre-existing uint8arrays/WalletConnect resolution file failures unrelated to lane). check:design-generated, check:design-tokens, lint:vocab green. Storybook: 143 stories pass quality gates after registering LocalizedToastsBridge as side-effect-only. plan-hub validate: 23 hubs validated.

state_api.handoff_note: No separate state/API lane is planned. Reopen only if implementation discovers shared state contract changes beyond localized toast/haptics helpers.

tdd.note: Native PWA remediation is scoped to UI/shared component behavior, localization, and docs; no state/API lane is planned.

contracts.handoff_note: No contract work is planned for this remediation slice.

qa_pass_1.handoff_note: Review localization, accessibility, native-feel behavior, design-system fit, and browser/mobile proof.

qa_pass_2.handoff_note: Re-run targeted validation, confirm plan-hub proof, and record remaining proof limits before closeout.

history.note: Formalized the existing client PWA audit findings into a standard active plan hub for native installed-PWA remediation. No runtime code changes in this update.

Shared registry+bridge for localized toasts; shared PwaSheet with drag-dismiss + reduced-motion immediate close; ModalDrawer + WorkDashboard migrated; DraftDialog + Gardeners on DialogShell; navigateWithTransition typed helper; haptics via shared helpers + Profile setting; PWA aria labels localized; DESIGN.pwa.md routing corrected.
